acceptanceCriteria.text: Entity detection added to search query preprocessing (detect names, projects, functions)
When entities detected, brain_search routes through kg_hybrid_search
KG results merged with standard RRF results (not replacing them)
Test: searching 'brainClaude' returns entity-linked chunks via KG path
Test: searching generic terms (no entities) still uses standard RRF path
Test: KG routing doesn't add more than 50ms latency to search
Run CodeRabbit review - must pass (or create BUG if unfixable)
Commit: feat: MP-004 wire kg_hybrid_search into brain_search routing
